sale.title: Lot 301 — Lakefront Premium
sale.description: Prime lakefront lot with mature landscaping, covered deck, and unobstructed water views. Fully serviced — electric, sewer, water, cable.

sale.title: Lot 315 — Garden View
sale.description: Quiet interior lot surrounded by beautiful mature trees. Concrete pad, full services, and a private hedged patio area.

sale.title: Lot 328 — Pool Adjacent
sale.description: Steps from the heated saltwater pool and spa. Corner lot with extra space, paved roads, and 24-hour gated security.

rental.title: Site 305 — Beachfront
rental.description: Premier beachfront site with direct lake access, full electric, sewer, water, cable. Concrete pad with mature shade trees.

rental.title: Site 314 — Pool View
rental.description: Steps from the heated saltwater pool and hot tub. Quiet interior position with paved road access and landscaped hedging.

rental.title: Site 331 — Garden Retreat
rental.description: Peaceful garden-view site surrounded by mature trees. Full services included. Walking distance to club hall and playground.
